report.summary: Cycle 4 standup (Mar 28 late). BTC $66,000–$66,194 (flat, $66K support holding). ETH ~$1,997 (sub-$2K day 3+). F&G moved 12→23 (still Extreme Fear but slight relief). KEY DELTA: Uncommitted files rose to 298 (+12 from cycle 3) — 2 new learn guides (TON DeFi, Sui DeFi) built, OG images + design audit completed. Deploy blocked 14th consecutive cycle. All 6 agents completed cycle 3. ETF outflows confirmed: $225.6M Mar 27, $296M weekly.

sections.title: Analytics
items: BTC: $66,000–$66,194. Flat since cycle 3. Testing $66K support for 3rd+ day. Down 24.6% YTD, 48% from Oct 2025 ATH ($126K). 28% below 200-day SMA. Iran/geopolitical tensions remain primary macro headwind.
ETH: ~$1,997, slight recovery from $1,985 last cycle. Sub-$2K for 3rd+ consecutive day. ETH/BTC at 0.0301 (lowest since Feb 2024). $253M mystery whale accumulation since Mar 1 continues.
F&G INDEX: 23 (Extreme Fear) — UP from 12 last cycle. Still deep fear territory but first meaningful bounce in 49+ day streak. Volume contracted to $95.99B (below 30-day avg $108B).

ETF FLOWS: Bitcoin ETF 4-week inflow streak BROKEN confirmed. $296M weekly outflows. Mar 27: $225.6M single-day outflow (BlackRock IBIT -$201.67M, Bitwise BITB -$18.60M, Ark ARKB -$5.35M). Analysts say capital 'avoiding directional risk' — not selling conviction but refusing new exposure until geopolitical clarity.

DELTA FROM LAST CYCLE (standup-v3): BTC unchanged ($66K range). ETH slight recovery ($1,985→$1,997). F&G improved 12→23. Uncommitted files 286→298 (+12 from build-2 + design-v3 cycles). No new commits. No new pages deployed. 2 new learn guides built (TON DeFi, Sui DeFi). 2 OG images + design audit completed.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE 4 OF MARCH 28. Three full rotations (all 6 agents each) completed today plus partial cycle 4. 16 total agent runs prior to this standup (standup×3, build×2, publish×2, design×3, community×3, eod×3). This standup is run #17.

WHAT SHIPPED IN CYCLE 3: 2 new learn guides (TON DeFi Ecosystem Guide 2026, Sui DeFi Ecosystem Guide 2026) with full SEO + FAQ schemas. 2 OG images (og-ton-defi-guide.svg, og-sui-defi-guide.svg). Design audit on 4 pages — added Breadcrumb + BackToTop to TON/Sui pages. 3 tweets (#220-222: TON ecosystem, Sui ecosystem, weekend builder update). SVG social card (Ecosystem Guides). Discord/Telegram announcement drafted.

CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS (CRITICAL): (1) Deploy — 298 uncommitted files (+12 from cycle 3), 14th cycle flagging P0. (2) 2 PUBLISH_QUEUE items blocked (wallet security slug mismatch + restaking no page.tsx). (3) 105 legacy published slugs missing page.tsx (81.9% coverage). (4) 145 TS errors in 6 files (stable, non-blocking). (5) 17 duplicate slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES (cosmetic). (6) Full build OOM in VM — Vercel CI untested.
GIT STATUS: HEAD at 21aaf5b (unchanged since Mar 25 batch deploy). 298 files pending (was 286 at cycle 3 standup). All changes additive — no destructive modifications.

PUBLISHED PAGES: 579 live (2 promoted in cycle 2: Solana LST, RWA vs DeFi Yield). Content velocity: ~4 pages/day average this week. Total content drafted: 222 tweets, 36 newsletter versions, 49+ SVG social cards.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — DEPLOY [CRITICAL, 14th CONSECUTIVE CYCLE]: 298 uncommitted files. Now spans 3 days and 17+ agent runs. Every learn page, OG image, UX fix from 60+ total agent runs is invisible to production. Google cannot index. The ETF outflow reversal + F&G bounce to 23 make timely content even more critical. Jefe: one git commit + push unlocks everything. 5-minute action, highest leverage possible.

PRIORITY 2 — TON/SUI GUIDES TO PRODUCTION [NEW]: Two comprehensive ecosystem guides (800+ lines each) are built, designed, audited, and in PUBLISH_QUEUE. Both target high-growth L1 ecosystems with zero existing degen0x coverage. TON has 1B+ Telegram users, Sui hit $2.6B TVL (+220% YoY). Promote to PUBLISHED_PAGES in next publish cycle.

PRIORITY 3 — ETF OUTFLOW + FEAR BOUNCE CONTENT: F&G bouncing 12→23 while ETF outflows continue creates narrative tension. Smart money vs retail panic theme remains strong. Tweets #217-222 queued. Build reactive content: 'Bitcoin ETF Outflows March 2026' explainer, 'Fear Index Bouncing — What It Means'. Time-sensitive search intent with few competitors.
